count_semantics: total ceiling; not split evenly between topics
topics_semantics: AUTO or comma-separated topic keys; missing requested topics may create new dynamic topic cells through the school cycle
partial_recovery_semantics: after restart only ABSORBED and CLEANED_AFTER_ABSORPTION patch ledger states count as memory progress
retention_semantics: patch raw proof in runtime; tracked repo gets compact run/topic summaries only; keep latest 3-5 patch runtime proofs after absorption
boundary: No Codex run and no long school run were executed. This is a validated launch/plan/recovery layer; active memory was not mutated.
